## Checklist

- [ ] I have removed secrets, tokens, local paths, generated build outputs, and logs.
- [ ] I have updated `README.md` and `README.en.md` if integration behavior changed.
- [ ] I have tested the affected module or explained why testing is not applicable.
- [ ] I have considered compatibility with existing Android integrations.
